WARNING: These test points are for A2779 (820-02655) ONLY. This board uses AUSTRINGER (not Viper) and CLVR (not Monaco). Component designators differ from A2442.
description: Decision trees for all 5V DCPS scenarios on A2779 (M2 Pro/Max). Pro/Max draws more idle current than Air due to CLVR and Austringer VRs. 42A SVR AON design.

scenarios.meaning: CD3217 not loading VBUS. Connector, cable, or CD3217 fault.

steps.measure: Probe CF400/CF401 (left ATC0) or CG401 (right ATC2)
steps.if_wrong: Cable or connector fault. Try other port.

steps.measure: Diode mode on UF400 (left) or UG400 (right) VDD pins
Move DCPS to each port in turn
steps.expected: At least one port draws current
steps.if_all_dead: All 3 CD3217s or upstream flex dead (liquid damage)

scenarios.meaning: CD3217 drawing some current but board not progressing. PPBUS_AON likely not coming up.

steps.if_wrong: PPBUS_AON shorted. Remove suspect cap, retest.

steps.if_missing: U5700 fault (42A design). Check PPVAON_PWR_EN enable.
UC260 fault or PP5V2P5_PWR_EN not asserted

steps.measure: Probe MPMU output caps (page 41) and PMU test points (page 137)

scenarios.meaning: Moderate current. PP3V8_AON likely present but downstream short.

steps.measure: PPBUS -> PP3V8_AON -> PP5V_S2 -> MPMU outputs -> CLVR0 -> Austringer -> CLVR1-4
steps.if_all_ok: Check PP3V3_S2 and USB-C LDOs for shorts

steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V3_UPC0_LDO, PP3V3_UPC1_LDO, PP3V3_UPC2_LDO
steps.if_wrong: CD3217 LDO short -> replace affected CD3217

steps.measure: Diode mode on PP3V8_AON_MPMU, PP3V8_AON_SPMU, PP3V8_AON_WLBT branches (page 34)

scenarios.meaning: Board drawing significant current. Either boot attempt stalling or downstream short.

steps.measure: Fan spin, keyboard backlight, display flash
steps.if_signs: Board trying to boot at 5V. CD3217 PD negotiation issue.

steps.measure: PPBUS -> PP3V8_AON -> PP5V_S2 -> MPMU -> CLVR0 -> Austringer -> CLVR1-4

steps.if_boots: PD negotiation issue. Replace CD3217 ROM.

scenarios.meaning: Very high current at 5V. Major short or boot attempt.

steps.measure: PPBUS decoupling -> PP3V8_AON caps -> PP5V_S2 output

steps.if_boots: Normal. M2 Pro/Max draws more at 5V during boot.
